name: Integrated
description: Integrated Ratchet built into the Blade for Expand Blade / Infinity system Beys.
assessment: Integrated Ratchet is not a separate part; it is built into specific Expand Blade (Infinity) system Blades such as BulletGriffon and GloryValkyrie. It exists in the database only to represent these combos structurally.
